characters.name: Adam Perry
characters.description: Adam PerryFull nameAdam PerryBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBaldStatusAliveFamilyBrennan Perry (Son)Career informationOccupationAssistant Deputy CommissionerAffiliationOffice of Disciplinary ActionsDepartmentChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationEpisodeTwo HundredPortrayed byJames MacDonald Adam Perryis the Assistant Deputy Commissioner of theChicago Fire Departmentand is responsible for major discipline. He approachedChristopher Herrmannabout holding a birthday party atMolly'sfor his son, Brennan. Herrmann met the son, and realizing Brennan was a minor and fearing repercussions after a paramedic call, he called inTrudy Plattto scare away Perry.

characters.name: Adrian Gish
characters.description: Adrian GishBiographical informationStatusDeceased†Cause of DeathDied in an office fireFamilyPiper Gish (Mother) Adrian Gishhad muscular dystrophy and was killed in an office fire in 2003 when he was unable to escape the building he was in due to its lack of wheelchair accessibility. Trenton Lamontstole the identity of Adrian Gish after his death.

characters.name: Al Wicker
characters.description: Al WickerFull nameAlan WickerBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityAfrican-AmericanHairBlackEyesBrownStatusIncarceratedCareer informationOccupationReal Estate MogulSeries informationEpisodeDead of WinterPortrayed byCedric Mays Alan Wickeris a real estate mogul who pushed to have the homeless encampment near his home removed. He put matters into his own hands when he used a propane tank to set off an explosion to take out the encampment and acted as a bystander who witnessed the whole thing, in which their leader,Big Jim, eventually died from smoke inhalation.Matthew CaseyandKelly Severideimmediately discovered that he was the one responsible for the arson, as well as learned of the clean-up crew he sent in. He was later arrested for murder and arson.

characters.name: Alan Cutler
characters.description: Alan CutlerBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairWhiteEyesBrownStatusAliveCareer informationOccupationFAA AgentAffiliationOffice of Accident Investigation and PreventionDepartmentFAASeries informationEpisodeFinish What You StartedPortrayed byMatt Walton Alan Cutleris an investigator in Federal Aviation Administration (FAA)'s Office of Accident Investigation and Prevention. He was investigating the plane crash near the school thatFirehouse 51responded to. AfterSeveridewas accused of stealing a strut from the crashed aircraft, he visited the firehouse in hopes of retrieving the strut. It is later discovered that a high school senior was in possession of the item. Instead of getting that kid in trouble with the FAA, Severide took the bullet and claimed that he mistook the strut for a Halligan tool bar.

characters.name: Alex Ward
characters.description: Alex WardNicknameSpecial Agent WardBiographical informationGenderFemaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBlackEyesBrownStatusAliveCareer informationOccupationDHS AgentDepartmentDepartment of Homeland SecuritySeries informationFirst seenLast seenThe Path of DestructionThe Sky is FallingPortrayed byLiza J. Bennett Special Agent Alex Wardis an agent for the Department of Homeland Security. She requested aid fromFirehouse 51in tracking down a serious threat in the Chicago area. She even grew connected withKelly Severideduring her investigation. They eventually discovered there was a terror attack at the Morrison Center for African-American Culture. She was wounded during the attack but survived and was transferred to Miami afterwards.

characters.name: Alexander Cannon
characters.description: Alexander CannonNicknameAlexBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityArabicHairBlackEyesBrownStatusAliveMarital statusMarriedRelationshipsDawn Cannon (Wife)Career informationOccupationBankerSeries informationEpisodeThe Man of the MomentPortrayed byAssaf Cohen Alexander Cannonis a wealthy banker whomRescue Squad 3andAmbulance 61saved at an archery range after he received an arrow to the neck. He attempted to gift each team member with either money or expensive phones, however, the team stood to the rules about accepting gifts like that. Alex is used to getting his way and was looking for a way to repay them for saving his life.Kelly Severidethen suggested making a huge donation toMax'sschool, in which he did.

characters.name: Alexander Cranston
characters.description: Alexander CranstonFull nameAlexander CranstonBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBlonde/GreyingEyesBlueStatusDeceasedCause of DeathPoisoned with dimethylmercury byThomas MarrMarital statusMarried toJoanie CranstonFamilyJoanie Cranston(Wife)Career informationOccupationDeputy District ChiefDepartmentChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationEpisodeComing in HotPortrayed byMax Martini Alexander Cranstonwas a Deputy District Chief in theChicago Fire Department. He had a long-running career in the fire department. Alexander Cranston used to bePascal'scommanding officer. In a house fire, he told the team to retreat, though Pascal thought they had time for one more sweep. A young woman was hiding behind her bed hoping for rescue, but they didn't find her and she died. Pascal blamed himself for not pushing back on the order.

characters.description: Allen ChoutFull nameAllen ChoutNickname'Chout'Biographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBlondeEyesGreenStatusAliveCareer informationOccupationParamedicAffiliationAmbulance 61/Firehouse 51(first shift)DepartmentChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationFirst seenLast seenNo RegretsDeathtrapPortrayed byAlex Weisman Allen Choutis a paramedic for theChicago Fire Department. He usually fills in for some off-duty paramedics forAmbulance 61as an interim replacement from time to time. He was known for his constant chattering, which annoyedGabriela Dawsonto no avail. WhenJim Andersonreassigned people, he temporarily replacedSylvie Brettfor a short time. He was on 1st shift forAmbo 61withRafferty

characters.name: Allen John Webber
characters.description: Allen John WebberFull nameAllen John WebberBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityAfrican-AmericanHairBlackEyesBrownStatusIncarceratedFamilyUnknown KidsCareer informationOccupationFormerlyFirefighterAffiliationFormerlyEngine 17/Firehouse 17DepartmentFormerlyChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationEpisodeBarely GonePortrayed byRonnie Hudson II Allen John Webberis a former firefighter-turned-arsonist who was atFirehouse 17. He was a rookie at 17 but never made the cut. 8 years later, he sought payback against Firehouse 17 by creating incendiary traps. The first one blew up at 17 while the Fire crew were on a job. He then started sending more devices where the 17 crew were stationed, atFirehouse 51andFirehouse 105. One of his bombs prematurely blew up under an underpass while being delivered and the delivery driver died.Severidesoon realized that only Firehouse 17 was the only target. He was taken down byBodenand his bomb plot was thwarted. He was later arrested.

characters.name: Allen John Webber
characters.description: Allen John WebberFull nameAllen John WebberBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityAfrican-AmericanHairBlackEyesBrownStatusIncarceratedFamilyUnknown KidsCareer informationOccupationFormerlyFirefighterAffiliationFormerlyEngine 17/Firehouse 17DepartmentFormerlyChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationEpisodeBarely GonePortrayed byRonnie Hudson II Allen John Webberis a former firefighter-turned-arsonist who was atFirehouse 17. He was a rookie at 17 but never made the cut. 8 years later, he sought payback against Firehouse 17 by creating incendiary traps. The first one blew up at 17 while the Fire crew were on a job. He then started sending more devices where the 17 crew were stationed, atFirehouse 51andFirehouse 105. One of his bombs prematurely blew up under an underpass while being delivered and the delivery driver died.Severidesoon realized that only Firehouse 17 was the only target. He was taken down byBodenand his bomb plot was thwarted. He was later arrested.

characters.name: Allen Tullis
characters.description: Allen TullisBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBrownStatusAliveCareer informationOccupationEditor-in-ChiefJournalistAffiliationChicago TelegraphSeries informationFirst seenLast seenProfilesHiding Not SeekingPortrayed byMichael Sherwin Allen Tullisis the Editor-in-Chief at the Chicago Telegraph. He wasLarry Shepard'sfinal target in the bombings after Tullis fired him to cover the CT of an embarrassing story that defamed Shepard. Larry was prepared to take him out in a suicide bombing at the Chicago Transit, but Tullis was saved by theChicago Police Departmentand theChicago Fire Department.

characters.name: Allison Rafferty
characters.description: Allison RaffertyBiographical informationGenderFemaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBrownEyesBrownStatusAliveMarital statusWidowedFamilyUnnamed fiancé†Career informationOccupationParamedic in-chargeAffiliationAmbulance 61/Firehouse 51(first shift, currently unknown)FormerlyAmbulance 24DepartmentChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationFirst seenLast seenShoved in My FaceA Dark DayPortrayed byChristine Evangelista Allison Raffertywas a Paramedic in Charge (PIC) assigned to Ambulance 61 of Firehouse 51. She was introduced in Season 2 asDawson'sreplacement while she was training to become a firefighter. She was portrayed byChristine Evangelista. Initially, Rafferty seems distant towardShay. When Shay confronts her, Rafferty reveals that her partner on Ambulance 24 was a lesbian and used to make phone calls to her girlfriend that made Rafferty uncomfortable. In her second episode appearance, it is revealed that she was a resident physician at Chicago Med, but dropped out when her fiancé developed Hodgkin's lymphoma; he died six months later.

characters.name: Andre Hopkins
characters.description: Andre HopkinsFull nameAndre HopkinsNicknameChief HopkinsHopkinsBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityAfrican-AmericanHairBaldEyesBrownFamilyUnnamed daughterCareer informationOccupationBattalion ChiefAffiliationBattalion 31/District 3Firehouse 51FormerlyFirehouse 66/District 4DepartmentChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationFirst seenLast seenFirehouse 66Exit PointPortrayed byRob Morgan Andre Hopkinsis a Battalion Chief with theChicago Fire Department, assigned toBattalion 31in District 3  He has served temporarily at other firehouses, includingFirehouse 51, while covering for absent or reassigned personnel. Before he was a Chief he served as a Firefighter atFirehouse 66. Years before the Season 14 events, Andre Hopkins was temporarily suspended from the Chicago Fire Department byBenny Severidefor a conduct unbecoming charge he faced alongsideJean Williams. Hopkins came to view Benny as a symbol of nepotism and cronyism within the department and has carried a long‑standing grudge ever since. That history explains much of his uncompromising stance and the friction that develops between him andKelly Severidewhen Hopkins is assigned to Firehouse 51.

Before he was a Chief he served as a Firefighter atFirehouse 66. Years before the Season 14 events, Andre Hopkins was temporarily suspended from the Chicago Fire Department byBenny Severidefor a conduct unbecoming charge he faced alongsideJean Williams. Hopkins came to view Benny as a symbol of nepotism and cronyism within the department and has carried a long‑standing grudge ever since. That history explains much of his uncompromising stance and the friction that develops between him andKelly Severidewhen Hopkins is assigned to Firehouse 51.

characters.name: Andre Keyes
characters.description: Andre KeyesBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityAfrican-AmericanHairBlackEyesBrownFamilyUnnamed FatherMary Keyes (Mother)Louie Thompson(Son)Tracy (Sister)Leah (Sister)Charles (Uncle)Career informationAffiliationUnited States ArmySeries informationFirst seenLast seenOne HundredThe People We MeetPortrayed byCharles Brice Andre KeyesisLouie'sbirth father. At first, he did not know that Louie existed. Once he found out, he wanted to meet Louie and take good care of him. Andre unsettledCaseyandDawsonby repeatedly showing up nearby and watching them. At first, they didn't know what he wanted. When Casey confronted him, he explained that he was Louie's dad.

characters.name: Andrew Darden
characters.description: Andrew DardenNickname"Andy"Badge #17137Biographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBrownEyesBlueStatusDeceased†Cause of DeathEngulfed by a Backdraft in the Line of DutyMarital statusMarried toHeather DardenFamilyHeather Darden(Wife)Griffin Darden(Son)Ben Darden(Son)Career informationOccupationFormerlyFirefighterAffiliationFormerlyTruck 81/Firehouse 51DepartmentFormerlyChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationFirst seenLast seenPilotPilotLast FlashbackAlwaysPortrayed byCorey Sorenson Andrew "Andy" Dardenwas a firefighter onTruck 81, assigned toFirehouse 51. Darden was killed in the line of duty, during the episode "Pilot" (scenes later used inMon AmourandCounting Your Breaths). He was shortly seen in a flashback in the episode "Always" whenLeslie Shayasked forGabriela Dawson. Andy andCaseywere very close since they attended Academy together. Their badge numbers are consecutive. Andy put Casey in his will as a guardian of his sons if he andHeatherboth perished. While Heather served her time in prison, the Darden boys lived with Casey.

characters.name: Andrew Darden
characters.description: Andrew DardenNickname"Andy"Badge #17137Biographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBrownEyesBlueStatusDeceased†Cause of DeathEngulfed by a Backdraft in the Line of DutyMarital statusMarried toHeather DardenFamilyHeather Darden(Wife)Griffin Darden(Son)Ben Darden(Son)Career informationOccupationFormerlyFirefighterAffiliationFormerlyTruck 81/Firehouse 51DepartmentFormerlyChicago Fire DepartmentSeries informationFirst seenLast seenPilotPilotLast FlashbackAlwaysPortrayed byCorey Sorenson Andrew "Andy" Dardenwas a firefighter onTruck 81, assigned toFirehouse 51. Darden was killed in the line of duty, during the episode "Pilot" (scenes later used inMon AmourandCounting Your Breaths). He was shortly seen in a flashback in the episode "Always" whenLeslie Shayasked forGabriela Dawson. Andy andCaseywere very close since they attended Academy together. Their badge numbers are consecutive. Andy put Casey in his will as a guardian of his sons if he andHeatherboth perished. While Heather served her time in prison, the Darden boys lived with Casey.

characters.name: Andrew Lewellen
characters.description: Andrew LewellenFull nameAndrew LewellenBiographical informationGenderMaleRace/EthnicityCaucasianHairBrownEyesBrownStatusDeceased†Cause of DeathKilled in an unknown wayMarital statusSingleCareer informationOccupationFormerlyFinancer and Organiser for Chess and Checkers ClubSeries informationEpisodeNobody Touches Anything Andrew Lewellenwas a victim in a fire where he was badly burnt. He returned to his house in order to retrieve a box from the basement, but the box was dropped and the photos it contained spilled everywhere which led to police discovering a major child trafficking, child pornography and pedophilia ring called the Chess and Checkers Club. Andrew Lewellen had been involved in the Chess and Checkers Club for nearly 10 years, helping with the financing for the entire operation. He sent $5K a month to a retirement home on behalf of Matilda Huges who worked for the Department of Children and Family Services in Chicago, helping to place children into foster care homes where they could then be trafficked to New York.
